chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-741 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 08-05-2024 M/s Abdul Raheem Mahar and Abdul Salam Shaikh, Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Additional A.G a/w Ubedullah Phulpoto, Assistant Accounts Officer, DAO, Khairpur and Mutahir Ali Shah, XEN East Division, Khairpur. ***** Assistant Accounts Officer, District Accounts Office, Khairpr is present and submits that since petitioner’s appointment has been converted into BPS-01, the District Accounts Office would process his case for release of salaries. In view of above, learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied and accordingly this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
